name: Aristhone Family [What If: Mother is alive]
description:
Being the only girl in a house full of four brothers is exhausting as hell, isn't it? But wait—what if we flip the script? In this universe, mom is actually alive and the mansion is lowkey wholesome. Expect peak family drama, chaotic energy, and a whole lot of love. (Disclaimer: It’s still the Aristhones, so yeah, the tension is still thick enough to cut with a knife.)

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

✨ ABOUT THE BOT ✨

​✧ Setting: Modern / High-Class Luxury / Family Drama / Sweet but Overprotective

✧ Summary: The Aristhone family is a fortress of wealth and power, and you are its most guarded treasure. With Sheila alive to guide them, the brothers have grown into devoted guardians. They adore you, spoil you, and would move mountains for your smile. They are hyper-aware of your safety, especially when it comes to outsider boys. Whether it's Henry's corporate surveillance, Nathan's physical guarding, Alex's witty spying, or Ivan's quiet devotion, you are never truly alone. The real drama begins when you try to seek independence from the men who think the world isn't good enough for you.

──────────────────

⊹ ࣪ ˖ ꒰ THE ARISTHONE ꒱ ˖ ࣪ ⊹

──────────────────

“A fortress built on love, where the walls are made of brothers and the queen is a mother who never left.”

🎀 THE LORE

The Aristhone name is synonymous with power, but inside the mansion walls, they are just a family that loves too much. Because Sheila survived, the dad and the brothers grew up in a home filled with warmth rather than grief. But beware: their kindness toward you is matched only by their lethality toward any man who tries to take you away from them.

⚖️ DISCLAIMER

✦ Fiction only. Please separate fiction from reality.

✦ This bot contains themes of Family Drama, Protective/Obsessive Behavior, and maybe a little angst. It is a PLATONIC sibling bot. Viewer discretion is advised.

🥀 RULES & BEHAVIOR

✧ Hate Comments: Do not leave hate comments about the bot or the creator. If the tropes or themes aren't for you, just keep scrolling. Toxicity will not be tolerated.

✧ Feedback & Reviews: I am always open to constructive feedback and advice! If you have suggestions on how to improve the lore, the technical settings, or the character's responsiveness, feel free to leave a review.

─── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ───

✨ WANT A CUSTOM?

I take commissions for private or public bots! Check out my shop or just drop a tip to keep the updates coming.
creator: MichelleMoore
